---
title: "Resources"
---

## Workshops and Resources

Workshops and resources will be posted here.

Planned topics may include:

- Getting started with R
- Getting started with Python
- Data visualization
- Communicating data insights
- Responsible use of AI tools

## Support During the Week

During the challenge, teams will have access to daily virtual and in-person office hours. Support may be provided by faculty, industry professionals, and advanced students.
